name: ai-refund-agent
description: AI Customer Support Agent for e-commerce refunds — Express/Anthropic tool-use backend, React + Socket.IO admin dashboard, browser voice pipeline.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n FASTAPI,CLIENT -c blue,magenta "cd fastapi_server && source venv/bin/activate && uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8787" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.dev:server: cd fastapi_server && source venv/bin/activate && uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8787
